channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: KMPDU Demands 55% Doctors Salary Increase in New 2025-2029 CBA
item.description: The Kenya Medical Practitioners, Pharmacists and Dentists Union (KMPDU) is pressing the government to implement the 2025–2029 Collective Bargaining Agreement that includes a 55 percent salary incremen...

item.title: The 1990 Cape Breton Drug Bust That Inspired the Film Little Lorraine
item.description: In July 1990, authorities foiled a major drug smuggling operation off the coast of Nova Scotia, near the small community of Baleine in Cape Breton. The plot involved roughly 24 tonnes of hashish, wort...

item.title: Truck Driver Arrested After Fatal Road Accident Kills Pedestrian and Motorcyclist in Lagos
item.description: On Sunday morning for Badagry Expressway, Lagos, serious wahala happen as one heavily-loaded bucket truck run over one pedestrian and one motorcyclist. LASTMA confirm say the truck driver dey speed fr...

item.title: Bangsamoro Chief Minister Abdulrauf Macacua Runs as Independent Candidate for Regional Parliament
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — Bangsamoro Chief Minister Abdulrauf Macacua has officially filed his certificate of candidacy (COC) to run as an independent candidate for a district parliamentary seat co...

item.title: UK Army parachutes medical team to Tristan da Cunha to support Briton with suspected hantavirus
item.description: A British Army medical team has parachuted onto the remote South Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha to assist a British resident with suspected hantavirus. The man had disembarked from the MV Hondius...

item.title: Security Forces Carry Out Major Operation Against Militants in Shewa, North Waziristan
item.description: In North Waziristan's Shewa tehsil, security forces have been conducting a large-scale operation against militants for the third consecutive day. Reports say seven militants, including two key command...

item.title: Ron White’s 2026 Net Worth and Career Highlights
item.description: Ron White, famously known as Tater Salad, is one of the most respected stand-up comedians from the U.S., especially as a charter member of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour. As of 2026, he is estimated to b...

item.title: Key Senatorial Contests Across Nigeria Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: As Nigeria dey waka towards the 2027 elections, political heat dey rise for plenty senatorial seats across di country. For Delta North, na showdown dey between Senator Ned Nwoko and ex-Governor Ifeany...

item.title: Cam Schlittler Becomes First MLB Pitcher Since 1913 With Remarkable Start to 2026 Season
item.description: New York Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler is off to an extraordinary start in the 2026 MLB season. In his first nine starts, Schlittler has recorded 59 strikeouts, issued only nine walks, allowed just o...

item.title: Victor Osimhen Scores Twice to Lead Galatasaray to 26th Turkish League Crown
item.description: Naija striker Victor Osimhen show serious skill as e help Galatasaray win their 26th Turkish Super Lig title with one gbaski comeback against Antalyaspor. The match for RAMS Park on Saturday night no ...

item.title: NTA Confirms NEET-UG 2026 Exam Held Securely, Assists Investigation on Reported Irregularities
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has confirmed that the NEET-UG 2026 examination was conducted with stringent security measures across all centres. The agency emphasised that all protocols were stric...

item.title: Albertans face challenges accessing funding for out-of-country medical care
item.description: Several Albertans are facing significant barriers when trying to access funding for medical treatments outside of Canada through the Out of Country Health Services Committee (OOCHSC). Tamara Polo, sev...

item.title: Two Men Fatally Shot in Kraaifontein; Social Media Footage Found to Be AI-Generated
item.description: In April 2026, a shooting incident in Kraaifontein, Cape Town, resulted in the deaths of two young men aged 18 and 20. While some images and videos circulated online claimed to show the aftermath, Afr...

item.title: Federal budget faces pressure to support Australia's rapidly ageing population and aged care needs
item.description: Australia's ageing population is placing increasing strain on the aged care sector, prompting calls for greater government investment as the country prepares for its federal budget. With more than 22 ...

item.title: Pakistan and Qatar Stress Continued Cooperation for Regional Peace Efforts
item.description: On Sunday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif had a telephone conversation with his Qatari counterpart Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani, during which both leaders reaffirmed their mutual...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Kenya High School: Fees, Admission, Dorms, and Contacts
item.description: Kenya High School, popularly known as 'Boma,' is one of Kenya's top national girls' boarding schools, located in Kileleshwa, Nairobi. Established in 1910, the school has a long history of academic exc...

item.title: AMVCA 2026: Stars Shine With Bold Fashion And African Heritage
item.description: For AMVCA 2026 wey hold for Eko Hotels, Lagos, the red carpet no be small thing at all. Celebrities bring serious style, from gowns wey dey defy gravity to outfits wey celebrate African culture. Cultu...

item.title: 20 True-Crime Documentaries Showcasing Remarkable Real-Life Cases
item.description: True-crime documentaries continue to captivate audiences worldwide, exploring some of the most shocking real-life cases. This collection of 20 documentaries spans the globe and covers a variety of cri...

item.title: PM Modi criticises Congress over DMK alliance and Karnataka leadership issues
item.description: On Sunday, Prime Minister Narendra Modi accused the Indian National Congress of betraying its long-standing ally, Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK), during a Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) event in Bengal...

item.title: How Social Stigma Stops Women from Reporting Abuse in Pakistan
item.description: In Pakistan, many women hesitate to report abuse because of deep-rooted societal beliefs. The common saying 'Sharif larkiyaan thaney nahi jaati' discourages women from going to police stations, making...
